sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value DOUBLE, description TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 1.5, 'first record', NOW()), (2, 2.5, NULL, NOW()), (3, 3.5, 'third record', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY');
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INTEGER, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), created_date DATE);
SELECT query('SELECT SUM(amount ^ 2) AS total_amount FROM another_table WHERE created_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE(created_date) HAVING total_amount > 100.00;');
SELECT query('SELECT id, value, description FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM another_table) OR description IS NULL;');
SELECT query('SELECT id, COUNT(value) AS value_count FROM (SELECT value, EXP(value) AS exp_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) sub GROUP BY id HAVING value_count > 0;');

SELECT query('SELECT id, value, description, (value ^ 3) AS cubed_value FROM test_table WHERE LENGTH(description) < 10 AND id IN (SELECT id FROM another_table WHERE amount > 150.00) ORDER BY cubed_value DESC;');

SELECT query('SELECT id, created_at, (CASE WHEN created_at IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - created_at) END) AS age_in_seconds FROM test_table WHERE created_at > (SELECT MIN(created_date) FROM another_table) ORDER BY age_in_seconds;');
SELECT query('SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IN (SELECT amount ^ 0.5 FROM another_table WHERE amount IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY value DESC;');
